scripts.build: node scripts/guard-no-local-tools-deploy.mjs && tsx scripts/validate-coupon-offers.ts && node scripts/run-with-lock.mjs next build
scripts.verify:quick: npm run test && npm run security:smoke
scripts.verify:ci: npm run lint && npm run test
scripts.verify:seo: npm run audit:seo-titles && npm run audit:schema && npm run audit:share && npm run audit:orphans && npm run audit:nav-coverage && npm run audit:redirects
scripts.verify:predeploy: npm run predeploy:clean && npm run guard:local-tools && npm run verify:ci && npm run verify:seo && node scripts/audit-share-descriptions.mjs --all && npm run audit:headings && npm run audit:links && npm run generate:schema && npm run sync:blog-slugs && npm run build:full
scripts.lint:security: eslint --cache --cache-location node_modules/.cache/eslint lib/safe-json-ld.ts lib/sanitize-html.ts lib/embed-url.ts lib/form-validation.ts app/api/lead-notify/route.ts components/blog/BlogPostingJsonLd.tsx components/marketing/LazyClickEmbed.tsx "app/(blog)/blog/[slug]/page.tsx" scripts/run-with-lock.mjs scripts/stop-builds.mjs --max-warnings 0
scripts.build:full: node scripts/run-with-lock.mjs -- next build && npm run index:search
scripts.vercel-build: node scripts/guard-no-local-tools-deploy.mjs && tsx scripts/validate-coupon-offers.ts && npm run generate:schema && npm run sync:blog-slugs && npm run build:full
scripts.index:search: node scripts/prepare-pagefind.mjs && node scripts/run-pagefind.mjs && node -e "try{require('fs').rmSync('.pagefind-src',{recursive:true,force:true})}catch(e){console.warn('[index:search] cleanup skipped:',e.message)}"
scripts.test: node --import tsx --test hooks/useBookFlow.test.ts hooks/useBookingWizard.test.ts hooks/useLeadSubmit.test.ts lib/studio-form-draft.test.ts lib/studio-package-fit.test.ts lib/studio-split-booking-message.test.ts lib/book-wizard-urgency.test.ts lib/book-wizard-cro/shared-contact.test.ts lib/book-wizard-cro/urgency.test.ts lib/book-wizard-cro/types.test.ts lib/book-wizard-cro/useWizardGhostLead.test.ts lib/events-form-draft.test.ts lib/singer-form-draft.test.ts lib/reply-copy-builders.test.ts lib/closer-deep-link.test.ts lib/yc-lead-tag.test.ts lib/progressive-booking-message.test.ts lib/voice-search-intents.test.ts lib/mashup-copy-humanize.test.ts lib/data/pricing-book-map.test.ts lib/data/coupon-offers.test.ts lib/coupon-banner-storage.test.ts
